findings: Commander file propagates premium pool and banned list via swarm-state schema, policy prose, and context capsule (agents/stampede-commander.agent.md:93-111, 148-169, 176-224).
Launcher embeds premium policy in fleet and swarm-state metadata and instructs commanders in prompt (bin/stampede.sh:750-791, 792-832, 906-909).
No environment variables export model policy to child processes; enforcement relies on prompt/state file parsing (bin/stampede.sh:921-936).
Operator override text allows platform refusal caveat, creating ambiguity in banned-model fallback handling (bin/stampede.sh:912-913).
